ideals: I addressed challenges with my unique perspective, talents, or culture
I expressed heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
I made a new friend, or deepened an existing friendship
system.secondWind: Regain all effort when you spend a scene trying not to use your unique talents or abilities.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: You gain +1d to set characters up.

powers.name: Xenoclash
powers.description: Choose two actions. Once a session, you can push each without spending effort.

powers.name: Gaia Compass
powers.description: You have a knack for navigation. Always know distance and direction to the nearest: I: Village. II: Town. III settlement. You can sense dungeons within a few miles.

powers.name: Open Up
powers.description: Spend time with one character during an interlude. You can each aid each other once without spending effort during the next expedition.

powers.name: Bloom
powers.description: Any character can set out a 4 segment ambition to learn your language. If they finish, they gain 1 xp and can communicate with you privately.

powers.name: Earth Glide
powers.description: You have an unusual way of moving. Gain a knack for certain terrain. Pick one per chapter, Oceans, Mountains, Snow, Swamps, Deserts.

powers.name: Tour Guide
powers.description: When a character works on ambitions, they can bring you along. Roll 1d6: 1: -1d. 2-5: +1d. 6: +1d and tick 1 more segment.

powers.name: Earth Speech
powers.description: You can speak and understand something unusual. Pick one per chapter, Plants, Rocks, Weapons, Tools, Vehicles.

powers.name: Centered
powers.description: 1/session - Share your unique cuisine or habit with someone. They gain +1d to set you up for the session, and you get +1d on the next roll involving them.

powers.name: Resourceful
powers.description: You can bring one more piece of loose gear on an expedition.

powers.name: The Wave
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the effect of your next sense action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of the Formless
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Outsider's Kit
items: Strangely shaped lantern, pack, bedroll, 5 fire stones, food from home, foreign clothes, local clothes, icon from a distant land, unique weapon or tool, script in a foreign language
